backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a social media platform with user profiles, posts, stories, comments, notifications, messages, and reports, including access control, blob storage mixins, and visibility/permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, profiles, messaging, posts, stories, follow system, notifications, search, reporting) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including hooks for data fetching, components for UI features, and styling configurations for the Yasa social media app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining light and dark theme color variables using OKLCH color space for consistent styling across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Yasa application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for feed, profile, messages, search, notifications, and admin pages, plus profile setup modal logic and authentication guards.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsPag: Admin-only page displaying content reports with access control check, showing report details including reporter, reported user/post, reason, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGuard.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to landing page and displays loading spinner during authentication initialization.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button with Internet Identity integration, handling authentication state, loading states, and clearing query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/feed/FeedPage.ts: Main feed page component that displays public posts with infinite scroll, a stories bar, and a floating button to create new posts.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout component providing the app header with logo, main content area, bottom navigation, and footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Mobile bottom navigation bar with icons for Home, Search, Notifications (with badge), and Profile pages.
frontend/src/components/messages/Convers: One-on-one message conversation view with scrollable message history, user header, and message input form.
frontend/src/components/messages/Message: Messages landing page displaying an empty state with instructions to send messages from user profiles.
frontend/src/components/notifications/No: Badge component showing unread notification count, displayed on the notifications navigation icon.
Notifications list page displaying all notifications with unread indicators and click-to-mark-read functionality.
frontend/src/components/posts/CommentsLi: Comments section component with scrollable comment list, user avatars, timestamps, and input form for adding new comments.
frontend/src/components/posts/CreatePost: Modal dialog for creating posts with text content, multiple media uploads with progress tracking, and visibility settings.
frontend/src/components/posts/PostCard.t: Displays a single post with author info, content, media, like/comment interactions, and a dropdown menu to report posts. Includes a CommentsList component and handles post engagement actions.
frontend/src/components/profile/EditProf: Modal dialog for editing user profile including username, bio, profile photo upload with progress tracking, and visibility toggle. Uses hooks to fetch and save profile data.
frontend/src/components/profile/FollowBu: Button component that toggles follow/unfollow state for a target user, displaying appropriate icons and text based on current follow status. Hidden when viewing own profile.
frontend/src/components/profile/Follower: Modal dialog displaying a scrollable list of users who follow a given profile, with clickable items that navigate to each follower's profile page.
frontend/src/components/profile/Followin: Modal dialog displaying a scrollable list of users that a given profile follows, with clickable items that navigate to each followed user's profile page.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileP: Main profile page component showing user avatar, username, bio, follower/following counts, and edit/follow buttons. Manages modals for editing profile and viewing followers/following lists.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Non-dismissible modal for first-time profile creation requiring username input, with optional bio and profile photo upload. Displays upload progress and creates profile with public visibility by default.
frontend/src/components/reports/ReportMo: Modal dialog component for reporting users or posts with a dropdown for predefined reasons and an optional text area for additional details. Submits reports via the useReportContent hook and displays toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchPag: Search page component that allows users to search for other users by username, displaying results as clickable cards with avatars and bios. Currently has a placeholder navigation implementation.
frontend/src/components/stories/CreateSt: Modal dialog for creating stories with image/video upload functionality, showing upload progress and preview. Stories are created via useCreateStory hook and expire in 24 hours.
frontend/src/components/stories/StoriesB: Horizontal scrollable bar displaying story avatars, with a "Your Story" button that opens the CreateStoryModal. Currently only shows the current user's story creation option.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useFollow.ts: Provides React Query hooks for following/unfollowing users and fetching followers/following lists. All mutations invalidate related profile and relationship queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validity. Handles AuthClient creation with configurable options and idle behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useMessages.ts: React Query hooks for messaging functionality including fetching messages between users (with 5-second polling), sending messages, and marking messages as read.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Provides hooks for fetching notifications (with 10-second polling) and marking individual notifications as read, invalidating the notifications query on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostInteractions.t: React Query mutation hooks for liking posts and commenting on posts, both invalidating the publicPosts query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/usePosts.ts: React Query hooks for fetching public posts (with 10s polling), creating posts with content/media/visibility, and deleting posts, all with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Minimal wrapper hook that exposes the actor, fetching state, and query client from useActor for centralized React Query management.
frontend/src/hooks/useReports.ts: React Query hooks for reporting content (users or posts with reasons) and fetching all reports, with cache invalidation on successful report submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useStories.ts: React Query hooks for fetching user stories by userId (with 30s polling) and creating stories with media, invalidating cache on creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching the caller's profile, saving/updating the caller's profile, and fetching any user's profile by userId with Principal conversion.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserSearch.ts: React Query hook for searching users by username/display name with 300ms debouncing to reduce backend calls during typing.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining coral-to-purple gradient theme for both light and dark modes, plus gradient utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and wraps the app with InternetIdentityProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with hero section, feature cards (connect, share stories, messaging), and login button using gradient branding and generated assets.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash routes, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup helpers for sensitive data.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color variables, custom border radii, shadows, and animations (accordion, fade-in) plus typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file for 'yasa', a social media app with real-time chat, voice/video calls, Instagram/Snapchat-style features, AI-powered content creation and moderation. Defines 16 existing features including authentication, profiles, messaging, posts, stories, feeds, likes/comments, follow system, voice/video calls, AR filters, AI content generation, cross-platform integration, content moderation, notifications, search, and analytics.
